description_long: This is a robust, rectangular couch with a solid, blocky design and a dark brown, slightly weathered finish. The seat and backrest are both flat and firm, with two rectangular back cushions integrated into the backrest. The armrests are wide, squared, and extend fully to the front, matching the geometric style of the base and back. The couch sits directly on the ground with no visible legs, giving it a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears to be a faux leather or vinyl material, with subtle surface creases and a matte finish.
description: A dark brown, blocky couch with wide square armrests, integrated back cushions, and a solid, grounded base. The upholstery has a slightly weathered, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two rectangular back cushions, and wide, squared armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, rectangular armrest and the solid, boxy profile of the couch.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a flat, unadorned back with the armrests extending slightly beyond the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the continuous seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two rectangular back cushions are integrated into the backrest, with a single continuous seat cushion; all cushions appear attached and not loose, with no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown with a slightly weathered, matte texture and subtle surface creases; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is a continuous, solid block that sits directly on the ground.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, straight, and rectangular, matching the height of the backrest and extending fully to the front; they are solid and unadorned.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is high, flat, and continuous with two integrated rectangular cushions; it is attached and not tufted, with a simple, geometric design.
